top3.sql:
SELECT 
    c_customer_id,
    ca_address_id,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN customer ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
    JOIN customer_address ON c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d_date BETWEEN '1999-02-22' AND '1999-03-24'
GROUP BY 
    c_customer_id,
    ca_address_id
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT 
    cd_demo_sk,
    hd_demo_sk,
    ca_address_sk,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN customer ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
    JOIN customer_address ON c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
    JOIN customer_demographics ON c_current_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk
    JOIN household_demographics ON c_current_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d_date BETWEEN '1999-02-22' AND '1999-03-24'
GROUP BY 
    cd_demo_s...

    JOIN customer ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk

ORDER BY

LIMIT 100;

SELECT 
    hd_buy_potential,
    CASE 
        WHEN ss_sold_date_sk IS NOT NULL THEN 'store'
        WHEN cs_sold_date_sk IS NOT NULL THEN 'catalog'
        WHEN ws_sold_date_sk IS NOT NULL THEN 'web'
    END AS sales_channel,
    SUM(COALESCE(ss_ext_sales_price, 0) + COALESCE(cs_ext_sales_price, 0) + COALESCE(ws_ext_sales_price, 0)) AS total_sales
FROM 
    customer
    JOIN household_demographics ON c_current_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk
    LEFT JOIN store_sales ON c_customer_sk = ss_customer_sk AN...

final.sql:
SELECT 
    c_customer_id,
    ca_address_id,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN customer ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
    JOIN customer_address ON c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d_date BETWEEN '1999-02-22' AND '1999-03-24'
GROUP BY 
    c_customer_id,
    ca_address_id
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100;
